title: Roblox Earnings Q2 2024 Takeaways
text: Q2 2024 earnings delivered several key takeaways for Roblox investors and stakeholders. Revenue beat expectations at $893.5 million versus guidance of $855-$880 million. Bookings of $955 million drove the quarter's success, with first-ever bookings run-rate exceeding $1 billion. Daily active users reached all-time highs of 79.5 million. The company maintained focus on long-term growth with 20%+ revenue growth targets through 2027. Management discussed emerging monetization opportunities in education and professional markets beyond gaming. International expansion remained a key growth driver with significant growth rates in Japan and India. The company's path to profitability remained uncertain, with near-term losses expected to continue. Stock-based compensation remained a drag on profitability despite strong revenue growth. Management emphasized the platform's unique position in the metaverse and AI-enabled content creation. Analysts appreciated the company's user growth and engagement metrics but remained concerned about profitability timeline.
